virtual const double cgaga_HB (const double mu) const
 The Higgs-basis coupling \(c_{\gamma\gamma}\). (See LHCHXSWG-INT-2015-001 document.) Note that the Lagrangian definition of the Higgs-basis parameters coincides with the one of some of the \(g_i, \delta g_i\) couplings defined above. In the Higgs basis, however, one uses the freedom to perform certain field redefinitions and operations to demand that the mass eigenstate Lagrangian has specific features. (See pag. 5,6 in the reference.) Therefore, the actual expression in terms of dim 6 coefficients may differ from the one for \(g_i, \delta g_i\). More...
 
virtual const double cgg_HB (const double mu) const
 The Higgs-basis coupling \(c_{gg}\). (See LHCHXSWG-INT-2015-001 document.) Note that the Lagrangian definition of the Higgs-basis parameters coincides with the one of some of the \(g_i, \delta g_i\) couplings defined above. In the Higgs basis, however, one uses the freedom to perform certain field redefinitions and operations to demand that the mass eigenstate Lagrangian has specific features. (See pag. 5,6 in the reference.) Therefore, the actual expression in terms of dim 6 coefficients may differ from the one for \(g_i, \delta g_i\). More...
 
virtual const double cggEff_HB (const double mu) const
 The effective Higgs-basis coupling \(c_{gg}^{Eff}\). (Similar to cgg_HB but including modifications of SM loops.) (See arXiv: 1505.00046 [hep-ph] document.) Note that the Lagrangian definition of the Higgs-basis parameters coincides with the one of some of the \(g_i, \delta g_i\) couplings defined above. In the Higgs basis, however, one uses the freedom to perform certain field redefinitions and operations to demand that the mass eigenstate Lagrangian has specific features. (See pag. 5,6 in the reference.) Therefore, the actual expression in terms of dim 6 coefficients may differ from the one for \(g_i, \delta g_i\). More...

virtual const double cZBox_HB (const double mu) const
 The Higgs-basis coupling \(c_{z\Box}\). (See LHCHXSWG-INT-2015-001 document.) Note that the Lagrangian definition of the Higgs-basis parameters coincides with the one of some of the \(g_i, \delta g_i\) couplings defined above. In the Higgs basis, however, one uses the freedom to perform certain field redefinitions and operations to demand that the mass eigenstate Lagrangian has specific features. (See pag. 5,6 in the reference.) Therefore, the actual expression in terms of dim 6 coefficients may differ from the one for \(g_i, \delta g_i\). More...

In the Higgs basis, however, one uses the freedom to perform certain field redefinitions and operations to demand that the mass eigenstate Lagrangian has specific features. virtual const double deltacZ_HB (const double mu) const
 The Higgs-basis coupling \(\delta c_z\). (See LHCHXSWG-INT-2015-001 document.) Note that the Lagrangian definition of the Higgs-basis parameters coincides with the one of some of the \(g_i, \delta g_i\) couplings defined above. In the Higgs basis, however, one uses the freedom to perform certain field redefinitions and operations to demand that the mass eigenstate Lagrangian has specific features. (See pag. 5,6 in the reference.) Therefore, the actual expression in terms of dim 6 coefficients may differ from the one for \(g_i, \delta g_i\). More...

virtual const double deltayb_HB (const double mu) const
 The Higgs-basis coupling \(\delta y_b\). (See LHCHXSWG-INT-2015-001 document.) Note that the Lagrangian definition of the Higgs-basis parameters coincides with the one of some of the \(g_i, \delta g_i\) couplings defined above. In the Higgs basis, however, one uses the freedom to perform certain field redefinitions and operations to demand that the mass eigenstate Lagrangian has specific features. (See pag. 5,6 in the reference.) Therefore, the actual expression in terms of dim 6 coefficients may differ from the one for \(g_i, \delta g_i\). More...

In the Higgs basis, however, one uses the freedom to perform certain field redefinitions and operations to demand that the mass eigenstate Lagrangian has specific features. (See pag. 5,6 in the reference.) Therefore, the actual expression in terms of dim 6 coefficients may differ from the one for \(g_i, \delta g_i\). More...

const double Als (const double mu, const int Nf_in, const orders order=FULLNLO) const
 Computes the running strong coupling \(\alpha_s(\mu)\) with \(N_f\) active flavours in the \(\overline{\mathrm{MS}}\) scheme. In the cases of LO, NLO and FULLNLO, the coupling is computed with AlsWithInit(). On the other hand, in the cases of NNLO and FULLNNLO, the coupling is computed with AlsWithLambda(). More...

const double AlsOLD (const double mu, const orders order=FULLNLO) const
 Computes the running strong coupling \(\alpha_s(\mu)\) in the \(\overline{\mathrm{MS}}\) scheme. In the cases of LO, NLO and FULLNNLO, the coupling is computed with AlsWithInit(). On the other hand, in the cases of NNLO and FULLNNLO, the coupling is computed with AlsWithLambda(). More...
 
const double AlsWithInit (const double mu, const double alsi, const double mu_i, const int nf, const orders order) const
 Computes the running strong coupling \(\alpha_s(\mu)\) from \(\alpha_s(\mu_i)\) in the \(\overline{\mathrm{MS}}\) scheme, where it is forbidden to across a flavour threshold in the RG running from \(\mu_i\) to \(\mu\). More...

 Computes the running strong coupling \(\alpha_s(\mu)\) in the \(\overline{\mathrm{MS}}\) scheme with the use of \(\Lambda_{\rm QCD}\). More...

◆ setNPSMEFTd6GeneralParameters()

void NPSMEFTd6CHRU::setNPSMEFTd6GeneralParameters ( )
protected

An auxiliary method to set the WC of the general class.

Definition at line 562 of file NPSMEFTd6CHRU.cpp.

562 {
563 double g1, g2, g3;
564 double g1_2, g1_3, g1_4;
565 double g2_2, g2_3, g2_4;
566 double g3_2, g3_3, g3_4;
567
568 double mstar_2;
569 double gstar_2;
570 double eps_u2, eps_u4;
571 double eps_d2, eps_d4;
572
573 double loop;
574
575 double CH, CT, CB, CW, C2B, C2W, C2G, Cg, CHB, CHW, Cga, C3W, C3G;
576 double CqD1_u, CqD1_d, CqD3_u, CqD3_d, CuD, CdD;
577
578 loop = 1/(16*M_PI*M_PI);
579
580 mstar_2 = mstar*mstar;
581 gstar_2 = gstar*gstar;
582
583 eps_u2 = eps_u*eps_u;
584 eps_u4 = eps_u*eps_u*eps_u*eps_u;
585 eps_d2 = eps_d*eps_d;
586 eps_d4 = eps_d*eps_d*eps_d*eps_d;
587
588 g1 = getSMEFTCoeffEW("g1");
589 g2 = getSMEFTCoeffEW("g2");
590 g3 = getSMEFTCoeffEW("g3");
591
592 g1_2 = g1*g1;
593 g1_3 = g1*g1*g1;
594 g1_4 = g1*g1*g1*g1;
595
596 g2_2 = g2*g2;
597 g2_3 = g2*g2*g2;
598 g2_4 = g2*g2*g2*g2;
599
600 g3_2 = g3*g3;
601 g3_3 = g3*g3*g3;
602 g3_4 = g3*g3*g3*g3;
603
604
605
606
607
608 // SILH universal operators
609
610 CH = cH*gstar_2/(mstar_2);
611 CT = 0; // TODO: CUSTODIAL BREAKING TERM, DEPENDS ON THE REPRESENTATIONS AND FLAVOR
612
613 CB = sign(scB)*cB/(mstar_2);
614 CW = sign(scW)*cW/(mstar_2);
615
616 C2B = sign(sc2B)*c2B/(gstar_2*mstar_2);
617 C2W = sign(sc2W)*c2W/(gstar_2*mstar_2);
618 C2G = sign(sc2G)*c2G/(gstar_2*mstar_2);
619
620 CHB = sign(scHB)*cHB*loop/(mstar_2);
621 CHW = sign(scHW)*cHW*loop/(mstar_2);
622
623 Cga = sign(scga)*cga*loop/(mstar_2); // TODO: add yt^2
624 Cg = sign(scg)*cg*loop/(mstar_2);
625
626 C3W = sign(sc3W)*c3W*loop/(mstar_2);
627 C3G = sign(sc3G)*c3G*loop/(mstar_2);
628
629 // Subleading EW vertices operators
630
631 CqD1_u = sign(scqD1_u)*cqD1_u/(eps_u2*gstar_2*mstar_2);
632 CqD1_d = sign(scqD1_d)*cqD1_d/(eps_d2*gstar_2*mstar_2);
633
634 CqD3_u = sign(scqD3_u)*cqD3_u/(eps_u2*gstar_2*mstar_2);
635 CqD3_d = sign(scqD3_d)*cqD3_d/(eps_d2*gstar_2*mstar_2);
636
637 CuD = sign(scuD)*cuD*eps_u2/mstar_2;
638 CdD = sign(scdD)*cdD*eps_d2/mstar_2;
639
640
641
642
643 // SMEFT operators
644
645 // Bosonic operators (9)
646
647 CG_LNP = C3G*g3_3;
648 CW_LNP = C3W*g2_3;
649 CHG_LNP = Cg*g3_2;
650 CHW_LNP = -CHW*g2_2/4;
651 CHB_LNP = -(CHB-4*Cga)*g1_2/4;
652 CHWB_LNP = -(CHB+CHW)*g1*g2/4;
653 CHD_LNP = -2*CT+CB*g1_2+CHB*g1_2-C2B*g1_4/2;
654 CHbox_LNP = (-4*CH-4*CT+2*CB*g1_2+2*CHB*g1_2-C2B*g1_4+6*CHW*g2_2+6*CW*g2_2-3*C2W*g2_4)/8;
655 CH_LNP = 0; // not 0 in principle
656
657
658 // Yukawa corrections (7 = 1 leptons + 6 quarks)
659
660 CuH_0_LNP = (2*CHW+2*CW-C2W*g2_2)*g2_2/4;
661 CdH_0_LNP = (2*CHW+2*CW-C2W*g2_2)*g2_2/4;
662 CeH_0_LNP = (2*CHW+2*CW-C2W*g2_2)*g2_2/4;
663
664 /*
665 cuH_u_LNP = 0;
666 cuH_d_LNP = 0;
667
668 cdH_d_LNP = 0;
669 cuH_u_LNP = 0;
670 */
671
672 // Dipoles (20 = 2 leptons + 18 quarks)
673 // Generated at 1-loop, skip for now
674
675
676 /*
677 CeW_0_LNP = 0;
678 CeB_0_LNP = 0;
679 */
680
681 CuG_0_LNP = sign(scuG)*cuG*loop*g3*gstar_2/(mstar_2);
682 CuW_0_LNP = sign(scuW)*cuW*loop*g2*gstar_2/(mstar_2);
683 CuB_0_LNP = sign(scuB)*cuB*loop*g1*gstar_2/(mstar_2);
684
685 CdG_0_LNP = sign(scdG)*cdG*loop*g3*gstar_2/(mstar_2);
686 CdW_0_LNP = sign(scdW)*cdW*loop*g2*gstar_2/(mstar_2);
687 CdB_0_LNP = sign(scdB)*cdB*loop*g1*gstar_2/(mstar_2);
688
689 CuG_u_LNP = sign(scuG_u)*cuG_u*loop*g3/(mstar_2*eps_u2);
690 CuW_u_LNP = sign(scuW_u)*cuW_u*loop*g2/(mstar_2*eps_u2);
691 CuB_u_LNP = sign(scuB_u)*cuB_u*loop*g1/(mstar_2*eps_u2);
692
693 CdG_u_LNP = sign(scdG_u)*cdG_u*loop*g3/(mstar_2*eps_u2);
694 CdW_u_LNP = sign(scdW_u)*cdW_u*loop*g2/(mstar_2*eps_u2);
695 CdB_u_LNP = sign(scdB_u)*cdB_u*loop*g1/(mstar_2*eps_u2);
696
697 CuG_d_LNP = sign(scuG_d)*cuG_d*loop*g3/(mstar_2*eps_d2);
698 CuW_d_LNP = sign(scuW_d)*cuW_d*loop*g2/(mstar_2*eps_d2);
699 CuB_d_LNP = sign(scuB_d)*cuB_d*loop*g1/(mstar_2*eps_d2);
700
701 CdG_d_LNP = sign(scdG_d)*cdG_d*loop*g3/(mstar_2*eps_d2);
702 CdW_d_LNP = sign(scdW_d)*cdW_d*loop*g2/(mstar_2*eps_d2);
703 CdB_d_LNP = sign(scdB_d)*cdB_d*loop*g1/(mstar_2*eps_d2);
704
705 // Higgs Currents (17 = 6 leptons + 11 quarks)
706
707 // P_LR: either cHu or cHd can be set to 0 with P_LR.
708 // P_LR: also cHq3 = -cHq1
709
710 CHl1_0_LNP = (-CB-CHB+C2B*g1_2)*g1_2/4;
711 CHl3_0_LNP = (CHW+CW-C2W*g2_2)*g2_2/4;
712 CHe_0_LNP = (-CB-CHB+C2B*g1_2)*g1_2/2;
713
714 CHq1_0_LNP = (CB+CHB-C2B*g1_2)*g1_2/12;
715 CHq3_0_LNP = (CHW+CW-C2W*g2_2)*g2_2/4;
716 CHu_0_LNP = (CB+CHB-C2B*g1_2)*g1_2/3 + sign(scHu)*cHu*eps_u2*gstar_2/(mstar_2) + CuD*g1_2/2;
717
718 if (FlagPLR) {
719 CHd_0_LNP = (-CB-CHB+C2B*g1_2)*g1_2/6 + CdD*g1_2/2;
720 } else {
721 CHd_0_LNP = (-CB-CHB+C2B*g1_2)*g1_2/6 + sign(scHd)*cHd*eps_d2*gstar_2/(mstar_2) + CdD*g1_2/2;
722 }
723
724 if (FlagPLR) {
725
726 CHq1_u_LNP = -sign(scHq3_u)*cHq3_u/(mstar_2*eps_u2) + CqD1_u*g1_2/2;
727 CHq3_u_LNP = sign(scHq3_u)*cHq3_u/(mstar_2*eps_u2) + CqD3_u*g2_2/2;
728
729 CHq1_d_LNP = -sign(scHq3_d)*cHq3_d/(mstar_2*eps_d2) + CqD1_d*g1_2/2;
730 CHq3_d_LNP = sign(scHq3_d)*cHq3_d/(mstar_2*eps_d2) + CqD3_d*g2_2/2;
731
732 } else {
733
734 CHq1_u_LNP = sign(scHq1_u)*cHq1_u/(mstar_2*eps_u2) + CqD1_u*g1_2/2;
735 CHq3_u_LNP = sign(scHq3_u)*cHq3_u/(mstar_2*eps_u2) + CqD3_u*g2_2/2;
736
737 CHq1_d_LNP = sign(scHq1_d)*cHq1_d/(mstar_2*eps_d2) + CqD1_d*g1_2/2;
738 CHq3_d_LNP = sign(scHq3_d)*cHq3_d/(mstar_2*eps_d2) + CqD3_d*g2_2/2;
739 }
740
741
742 // Four Fermions LL LL (4 leptons + 8 mixed + 24 quarks = 36)
743
744 Cll_00_LNP = (-C2B*g1_4+C2W*g2_4)/8;
745 Cllp_00_LNP = -C2W*g2_4/4;
746
747 /*
748 Cll_l0_LNP = 0;
749 Cllp_l0_LNP = 0;
750 */
751
752
753
754 Clq1_00_LNP = C2B*g1_4/12;
755 Clq3_00_LNP = -C2W*g2_4/4;
756
757 /*
758 Clq1_l0_LNP = 0;
759 Clq3_l0_LNP = 0;
760 */
761
762 Clq1_0u_LNP = -CqD1_u*g1_2/2;
763 Clq3_0u_LNP = CqD3_u*g2_2/2;
764
765 Clq1_0d_LNP = -CqD1_d*g1_2/2;
766 Clq3_0d_LNP = CqD3_d*g2_2/2;
767
768
769
770 Cqq1_00_LNP = (-C2B*g1_4+6*C2G*g3_4)/72;
771 Cqq1p_00_LNP = -C2G*g3_4/8;
772 Cqq3_00_LNP = -C2W*g2_4/8;
773 Cqq3p_00_LNP = -C2G*g3_4/8;
774
775 Cqq1_u0_LNP = CqD1_u*g1_2/6/2; // Extra factors of 2 for symmetrization
776 Cqq1p_u0_LNP = 0;
777 Cqq3_u0_LNP = CqD3_u*g2_2/2/2;
778 Cqq3p_u0_LNP = 0;
779
780 Cqq1_d0_LNP = CqD1_d*g1_2/6/2;
781 Cqq1p_d0_LNP = 0;
782 Cqq3_d0_LNP = CqD3_d*g2_2/2/2;
783 Cqq3p_d0_LNP = 0;
784
785 Cqq1_uu_LNP = sign(scqq1_uu)*cqq1_uu/(gstar_2*mstar_2*eps_u4);
786 Cqq1_ud_LNP = sign(scqq1_ud)*cqq1_ud/(gstar_2*mstar_2*eps_u2*eps_d2)/2;
787 Cqq1_dd_LNP = sign(scqq1_dd)*cqq1_dd/(gstar_2*mstar_2*eps_d4);
788 Cqq1p_uu_LNP = sign(scqq1p_uu)*cqq1p_uu/(gstar_2*mstar_2*eps_u4);
789 Cqq1p_ud_LNP = sign(scqq1p_ud)*cqq1p_ud/(gstar_2*mstar_2*eps_u2*eps_d2)/2;
790 Cqq1p_dd_LNP = sign(scqq1p_dd)*cqq1p_dd/(gstar_2*mstar_2*eps_d4);
791 Cqq3_uu_LNP = sign(scqq3_uu)*cqq3_uu/(gstar_2*mstar_2*eps_u4);
792 Cqq3_ud_LNP = sign(scqq3_ud)*cqq3_ud/(gstar_2*mstar_2*eps_u2*eps_d2)/2;
793 Cqq3_dd_LNP = sign(scqq3_dd)*cqq3_dd/(gstar_2*mstar_2*eps_d4);
794 Cqq3p_uu_LNP = sign(scqq3p_uu)*cqq3p_uu/(gstar_2*mstar_2*eps_u4);
795 Cqq3p_ud_LNP = sign(scqq3p_ud)*cqq3p_ud/(gstar_2*mstar_2*eps_u2*eps_d2)/2;
796 Cqq3p_dd_LNP = sign(scqq3p_dd)*cqq3p_dd/(gstar_2*mstar_2*eps_d4);
797
798
799 // Four Fermions RR RR (2 leptons + 6 mixed + 22 quarks = 30)
800
801
802 Cee_00_LNP = -C2B*g1_4/2;
803 /*
804 Cee_e0_LNP = 0;
805 */
806
807
808
809 Ceu_00_LNP = C2B*2*g1_4/3 - CdD*g1_2;
810 Ced_00_LNP = -C2B*g1_4/3 - CdD*g1_2;
811 /*
812 Ceu_e0_LNP = 0;
813 Ceu_0u_LNP = 0;
814
815 Ced_e0_LNP = 0;
816 Ced_0d_LNP = 0;
817 */
818
819
820
821 Cuu_00_LNP = (-8*C2B*g1_4+3*C2G*g3_4)/36 + 2*CuD*g1_2/3 + sign(cuu)*cuu*eps_u4*gstar_2/(mstar_2);
822 Cuup_00_LNP = -C2G*g3_4/4 + sign(cuup)*cuup*eps_u4*gstar_2/(mstar_2);
823
824 Cdd_00_LNP = (-2*C2B*g1_4+3*C2G*g3_4)/36 - CdD*g1_2/3 + sign(cdd)*cdd*eps_d4*gstar_2/(mstar_2);
825 Cddp_00_LNP = -C2G*g3_4/4 + sign(cddp)*cddp*eps_d4*gstar_2/(mstar_2);
826
827 Cud1_00_LNP = 2*C2B*g1_4/9 + (2*CdD-CuD)*g1_2/3 + sign(cud1)*cud1*eps_u2*eps_d2*gstar_2/(mstar_2);
828 Cud8_00_LNP = -C2G*g3_4 + sign(cud8)*cud8*eps_u2*eps_d2*gstar_2/(mstar_2);
829
830 /*
831 Cuu_u0_LNP = 0;
832 Cuup_u0_LNP = 0;
833
834 Cdd_d0_LNP = 0;
835 Cddp_d0_LNP = 0;
836
837 Cud1_u0_LNP = 0;
838 Cud1_0d_LNP = 0;
839 Cud8_u0_LNP = 0;
840 Cud8_0d_LNP = 0;
841
842 Cuu_uu_LNP = 0;
843 Cuup_uu_LNP = 0;
844
845 Cdd_dd_LNP = 0;
846 Cddp_dd_LNP = 0;
847
848 Cud1_ud_LNP = 0;
849 Cud1p_ud_LNP = 0;
850 Cud8_ud_LNP = 0;
851 Cud8p_ud_LNP = 0;
852 */
853
854
855
856 // Four Fermions LL RR (4 leptons + 10 mixed + 44 quarks = 58)
857
858 Cle_00_LNP = -C2B*g1_4/2;
859
860 /*
861 Cle_l0_LNP = 0;
862 Cle_0e_LNP = 0;
863 Cle_y_LNP = 0;
864 */
865
866
867
868 Cqe_00_LNP = C2B*g1_4/6;
869 Clu_00_LNP = C2B*g1_4/3 - CuD*g1_2/2;
870 Cld_00_LNP = -C2B*g1_4/6 - CdD*g1_2/2;
871
872 Cqe_u0_LNP = -CqD1_u*g1_2;
873 Cqe_d0_LNP = -CqD1_d*g1_2;
874 /*
875 Cqe_0e_LNP = 0;
876
877 Clu_l0_LNP = 0;
878 Clu_0u_LNP = 0;
879
880 Cld_l0_LNP = 0;
881 Cld_0d_LNP = 0;
882 */
883
884
885
886
887 Cqu1_00_LNP = -C2B*g1_4/9 + CuD*g1_2/6;
888 Cqu8_00_LNP = -C2G*g3_4;
889 Cqd1_00_LNP = C2B*g1_4/18 + CdD*g1_2/6;
890 Cqd8_00_LNP = -C2G*g3_4;
891
892 Cqu1_u0_LNP = 2*CqD1_u/3 + sign(cqu1_u)*cqu1_u/(mstar_2);
893 Cqu1_d0_LNP = 2*CqD1_d/3 + sign(cqu1_d)*cqu1_d*eps_u2/(mstar_2*eps_d2);
894 Cqu1_0u_LNP = 0;
895 Cqu1_y_LNP = sign(cqu1_y)*cqu1_y/(mstar_2);
896
897 Cqu8_u0_LNP = sign(cqu8_u)*cqu8_u/(mstar_2);
898 Cqu8_d0_LNP = sign(cqu8_d)*cqu8_d*eps_u2/(mstar_2*eps_d2);
899 Cqu8_0u_LNP = 0;
900 Cqu8_y_LNP = sign(cqu8_y)*cqu8_y/(mstar_2);
901
902 Cqd1_u0_LNP = -CqD1_u/3 + sign(cqd1_u)*cqd1_u*eps_d2/(mstar_2*eps_u2);
903 Cqd1_d0_LNP = -CqD1_d/3 + sign(cqd1_d)*cqd1_d/(mstar_2);
904 Cqd1_0d_LNP = 0;
905 Cqd1_y_LNP = sign(cqd1_y)*cqd1_y/(mstar_2);
906
907 Cqd8_u0_LNP = sign(cqd8_u)*cqd8_u*eps_d2/(mstar_2*eps_u2);
908 Cqd8_d0_LNP = sign(cqd8_d)*cqd8_d/(mstar_2);
909 Cqd8_0d_LNP = 0;
910 Cqd8_y_LNP = sign(cqd8_y)*cqd8_y/(mstar_2);
911
912 /*
913 Cqu1_uu_LNP = 0;
914 Cqu1_du_LNP = 0;
915 Cqu1_uy_LNP = 0;
916 Cqu1_dy_LNP = 0;
917 Cqu1_yu_LNP = 0;
918 Cqu1_yd_LNP = 0;
919
920 Cqu8_uu_LNP = 0;
921 Cqu8_du_LNP = 0;
922 Cqu8_uy_LNP = 0;
923 Cqu8_dy_LNP = 0;
924 Cqu8_yu_LNP = 0;
925 Cqu8_yd_LNP = 0;
926
927 Cqd1_ud_LNP = 0;
928 Cqd1_dd_LNP = 0;
929 Cqd1_uy_LNP = 0;
930 Cqd1_dy_LNP = 0;
931 Cqd1_yu_LNP = 0;
932 Cqd1_yd_LNP = 0;
933
934 Cqd8_ud_LNP = 0;
935 Cqd8_dd_LNP = 0;
936 Cqd8_uy_LNP = 0;
937 Cqd8_dy_LNP = 0;
938 Cqd8_yu_LNP = 0;
939 Cqd8_yd_LNP = 0;
940 */
941
942
943 // Four Fermions LR LR (3 mixed + 20 quarks = 23)
944
945
946 /*
947 Cledq_00_LNP = 0;
948 Clequ1_00_LNP = 0;
949 Clequ3_00_LNP = 0;
950 */
951
952
953
954 Cquqd1_00_LNP = sign(cquqd1)*cquqd1/(mstar_2);
955 Cquqd1p_00_LNP = sign(cquqd1p)*cquqd1p/(mstar_2);
956 Cquqd8_00_LNP = sign(cquqd8)*cquqd8/(mstar_2);
957 Cquqd8p_00_LNP = sign(cquqd8p)*cquqd8p/(mstar_2);
958
959 /*
960 Cquqd1_u0_LNP = 0;
961 Cquqd1_d0_LNP = 0;
962 Cquqd1_0u_LNP = 0;
963 Cquqd1_0d_LNP = 0;
964
965 Cquqd1p_u0_LNP = 0;
966 Cquqd1p_d0_LNP = 0;
967 Cquqd1p_0u_LNP = 0;
968 Cquqd1p_0d_LNP = 0;
969
970 Cquqd8_u0_LNP = 0;
971 Cquqd8_d0_LNP = 0;
972 Cquqd8_0u_LNP = 0;
973 Cquqd8_0d_LNP = 0;
974
975 Cquqd8p_u0_LNP = 0;
976 Cquqd8p_d0_LNP = 0;
977 Cquqd8p_0u_LNP = 0;
978 Cquqd8p_0d_LNP = 0;
979 */
980
981}

double sign(const double &value)
